title: Double Bill Cheaper Than Therapy Until Last Year
description: In 'Cheaper than Therapy', Italian comedian Francesco Ferrone invites you inside his quarter life crisis. You will learn something about being Italian, having a penis and fascists, all stuff than you will definitely need once world war three starts. "Exceptionally fun, but it's your fourth small dick joke in the last 5 minutes" - Francesco's Therapist Until Last Year is Beborah J's way of coming to terms with a late diagnosis of ADHD and autism. Ham slappingly silly, and absolutely outrageous.
